import{MessageEvent}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer';import{BlackjackStateParser}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/parser/roleplay/BlackJackState';export class BlackjackStateEvent extends MessageEvent{constructor(callback){// Wrap the original callback so we can log safely first
super(event=>{try{const parser=event.getParser();// Group logs for tidiness
// Tip: click to expand in DevTools
console.groupCollapsed('%c[🃏 Blackjack][STATE] packet received','color:#6a5acd;font-weight:bold;');if(!parser){console.warn('[🃏 Blackjack][STATE] No parser available');console.groupEnd();if(callback)callback(event);return;}// Pull the important fields (guard every access)
const tableId=parser.tableId;const phase=parser.phase;const minBet=parser.minBet;const maxBet=parser.maxBet;const dealerCards=parser.dealerCards;const dealerTotal=parser.dealerTotal;const dealerReveal=parser.dealerReveal;const players=parser.players;const endsInMs=parser.endsInMs;console.log('tableId:',tableId);console.log('phase:',phase);console.log('limits:',{minBet,maxBet});console.log('dealer:',{cards:dealerCards,total:dealerTotal,reveal:dealerReveal});console.log('players:',players);console.log('endsInMs:',endsInMs);// Quick sanity flags to spot malformed payloads
if(!Array.isArray(dealerCards))console.warn('[🃏 Blackjack][STATE] dealerCards is not an array');if(!Array.isArray(players))console.warn('[🃏 Blackjack][STATE] players is not an array');console.groupEnd();}catch(err){console.error('[🃏 Blackjack][STATE] Error while logging/reading parser:',err);}// Always call the original consumer callback
if(callback)callback(event);},BlackjackStateParser);}getParser(){return this.parser;}}
